steps.title: Identify the sentence structures
steps.content:
Left side of blank: independent clause (“In 1919 Larrazolo was elected governor of [New Mexico]”)
Right side of blank: independent clause (“in 1928 he became the nation's first Hispanic U.S. Senator”)

steps.title: Apply the joining rule
steps.content: A comma plus a coordinating conjunction is the correct way to join the clauses here. The credited option provides exactly this with “New Mexico, and.” The other options violate this rule by omitting either the comma, the conjunction, or both. C is correct.
